detailedDescription: The Kingston A400 256GB SATA SSD delivers reliable performance with read speeds up to 560MB/s and write speeds up to 530MB/s. Perfect for upgrading laptops and desktops, this 2.5" drive features the SATA III interface and includes advanced wear-leveling technology for enhanced durability.
additionalSpecs: 256GB Capacity | SATA III | 2.5" Form Factor | Up to 560MB/s Read | Up to 530MB/s Write | SLC Caching | 1.5M Hours MTBF
